descriptionText: Lagoon 40 for Sale 2019 – In Good Condition If you are looking for a comfortable and reliable cruising catamaran, this Lagoon 40 for sale 2019 is certainly worth considering. Built in 2019 and flying the Italian flag, she is located in Campania, Southern Italy—perfectly placed for Mediterranean exploration. Designed by VLPL, the Lagoon 40 is known for her stable performance, good use of space, and modern design. This particular boat has been maintained with care and is in good condition, making her ready for extended cruising or comfortable living aboard.Both practical and well-equipped, this Lagoon 40 for sale 2019 has all the features needed for comfortable sailing and long stays on board. With her sailing and navigation equipment, along with upgraded on-board systems, she stands out as a solid option in the market.SpecificationsModel: Lagoon 40Flag: ItalianYear: 2019Designer: VLPLLocation: Campania, ItalyCondition: GoodCE Class: ALength Overall: 11.74 mBeam: 6.76 mDraft: 1.20 mHull Colour: WhiteHull Material: VTR (fibreglass)Keel Material & Shape: VTR, boot typeTeak in Cockpit: YesCushions: YesDouble Cabins: 4Sailor’s Cabin: 1Berths in Saloon: 1Number of Toilets: 4Interior Wood Finish: Dark nutGalley Equipment: Cooker, oven, fridgeEngine: 2 x Yanmar 4JH45, 45 hp each (inboard, 2019)Transmission: S-drivePropeller Type: 3 fixed bladesSteering System: WheelFuel Tanks: 2 x 200 litresFresh Water Tank: 1 x 600 litresNumber of Bilge Pumps: 2 (manual and automatic)Number of Winches: 2 (Harken)Mast Type: VMG, deck-steppedLazy Bag: YesJib Furler: YesTender: Highfield 310 pvc, light grey, aluminium keelOutboard Engine: Suzuki 9.9 (2023, very good condition)Anchor Windlass: Quick 1000WAnchor: Delta 20 kgChain: 60 m, 10 mm diameterMooring Lines: IncludedLife Raft: Yes (valid to 2026)Fenders: 8 + 2Electronics: Autopilot, VHF, ECO, log, tridata, compass, stereo, plotter, radar, wind stationElectrical System: 12/220 V, 4+2 batteries (2025), 560A + 160A totalBattery Charger: YesGenerator: VTE 6kW, 1500 rpmWatermaker: Idromar, 100 litres/hourAir Conditioning: YesWater Heater: YesBlack Water Pump: YesExterior Shower: YesThis Lagoon 40 for sale 2019 represents a strong opportunity to own a modern, well-maintained catamaran, fully equipped for Mediterranean sailing or even longer passages. With an overall length of 11.74 metres and a generous beam of 6.76 metres, the Lagoon 40 for sale 2019 offers plenty of room both above and below deck. The hull is constructed in white VTR (fibreglass), with teak in the cockpit area and plush cushions for comfort. Four double cabins and a sailor’s cabin provide accommodation for family and guests, while four heads ensure convenience for everyone on board. The interior is finished in dark nut wood, lending a modern yet warm atmosphere to the saloon and cabins. Don't hesitate to contact us for more information or to book a viewing!
descriptionHtml:
Lagoon 40 for Sale 2019 – In Good Condition 

If you are looking for a comfortable and reliable cruising catamaran, this Lagoon 40 for sale 2019 is certainly worth considering. Built in 2019 and flying the Italian flag, she is located in Campania, Southern Italy—perfectly placed for Mediterranean exploration. Designed by VLPL, the Lagoon 40 is known for her stable performance, good use of space, and modern design. This particular boat has been maintained with care and is in good condition, making her ready for extended cruising or comfortable living aboard.

Both practical and well-equipped, this Lagoon 40 for sale 2019 has all the features needed for comfortable sailing and long stays on board. With her sailing and navigation equipment, along with upgraded on-board systems, she stands out as a solid option in the market.

Specifications

  • Model: Lagoon 40
  • Flag: Italian
  • Year: 2019
  • Designer: VLPL
  • Location: Campania, Italy
  • Condition: Good
  • CE Class: A
  • Length Overall: 11.74 m
  • Beam: 6.76 m
  • Draft: 1.20 m
  • Hull Colour: White
  • Hull Material: VTR (fibreglass)
  • Keel Material & Shape: VTR, boot type
  • Teak in Cockpit: Yes
  • Cushions: Yes
  • Double Cabins: 4
  • Sailor’s Cabin: 1
  • Berths in Saloon: 1
  • Number of Toilets: 4
  • Interior Wood Finish: Dark nut
  • Galley Equipment: Cooker, oven, fridge
  • Engine: 2 x Yanmar 4JH45, 45 hp each (inboard, 2019)
  • Transmission: S-drive
  • Propeller Type: 3 fixed blades
  • Steering System: Wheel
  • Fuel Tanks: 2 x 200 litres
  • Fresh Water Tank: 1 x 600 litres
  • Number of Bilge Pumps: 2 (manual and automatic)
  • Number of Winches: 2 (Harken)
  • Mast Type: VMG, deck-stepped
  • Lazy Bag: Yes
  • Jib Furler: Yes
  • Tender: Highfield 310 pvc, light grey, aluminium keel
  • Outboard Engine: Suzuki 9.9 (2023, very good condition)
  • Anchor Windlass: Quick 1000W
  • Anchor: Delta 20 kg
  • Chain: 60 m, 10 mm diameter
  • Mooring Lines: Included
  • Life Raft: Yes (valid to 2026)
  • Fenders: 8 + 2
  • Electronics: Autopilot, VHF, ECO, log, tridata, compass, stereo, plotter, radar, wind station
  • Electrical System: 12/220 V, 4+2 batteries (2025), 560A + 160A total
  • Battery Charger: Yes
  • Generator: VTE 6kW, 1500 rpm
  • Watermaker: Idromar, 100 litres/hour
  • Air Conditioning: Yes
  • Water Heater: Yes
  • Black Water Pump: Yes
  • Exterior Shower: Yes

This Lagoon 40 for sale 2019 represents a strong opportunity to own a modern, well-maintained catamaran, fully equipped for Mediterranean sailing or even longer passages. With an overall length of 11.74 metres and a generous beam of 6.76 metres, the Lagoon 40 for sale 2019 offers plenty of room both above and below deck. The hull is constructed in white VTR (fibreglass), with teak in the cockpit area and plush cushions for comfort. Four double cabins and a sailor’s cabin provide accommodation for family and guests, while four heads ensure convenience for everyone on board. The interior is finished in dark nut wood, lending a modern yet warm atmosphere to the saloon and cabins.
Don't hesitate to contact us for more information or to book a viewing!
